examples: The third type of symbiosis, mutualism, benefits both partners in the relationship.
There are three main types of symbiotic relationships: parasitism, commensalism, and mutualism.
Another example of mutualism would be the bull's horn acacia tree, which grows in Central and South America.
It has a tradition of mutualism, and many Labour-voting public-sector workers crave independence from central targets.
And I have become increasingly convinced that this idea of mutualism lies at the centre of the new politics.
